loan_type.text: ประเภทเงินกู้

root.sql:
select sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control ,pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name(sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control) as member_group_control_name ,sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type ,(select sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description from sc_lon_m_rule where loan_type = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type) as loan_type_description ,sum(sc_lon_m_req_fee.amount) as amount ,sc_lon_m_req_fee.fee_type ,(select fee_name from sc_lon_m_ucf_fee where fee_type = sc_lon_m_req_fee.fee_type) as fee_name --,sum((select sum(interest_first) from sc_lon_m_loan_request where loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no)) as interest_first from sc_lon_m_req_fee ,sc_lon_m_contract ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group where sc_lon_m_req_fee.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no
/*WHERE*/ --and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = '010256'
group by sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control ,sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type ,sc_lon_m_req_fee.fee_type
order by sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control ,sc_lon_m_req_fee.fee_type asc

r_tnma_loan_fee_group_nest.sql: SELECT SUM(sc_lon_m_req_fee.amount) AS amount, sc_lon_m_req_fee.fee_type, sc_lon_m_ucf_fee.fee_name, sum(lr.interest_first) as interest_first FROM sc_lon_m_req_fee, sc_lon_m_contract , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_lon_m_rule , sc_lon_m_ucf_fee, (SELECT loan_requestment_no, SUM(interest_first) AS interest_first FROM sc_lon_m_loan_request GROUP BY loan_requestment_no) lr WHERE sc_lon_m_req_fee.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no AND sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no AND sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no AND sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type(+) AND sc_lon_m_req_fee.fee_type = sc_lon_m_ucf_fee.fee_type(+) AND sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no = lr.loan_requestment_no(+) --AND sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = {0} --and sc_lon_m_contract .loan_type = {1} /*WHERE*/ GROUP BY sc_lon_m_req_fee.fee_type, sc_lon_m_ucf_fee.fee_name order by sc_lon_m_req_fee.fee_type asc
